entities.name: 23andMe
entities.context: Genomics data provider; V has 631k SNPs stored in a DuckDB dataset

entities.name: GeneSight
entities.context: Pharmacogenomics report from 2022-02-23, stored as PDF

entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable device syncing daily sleep, heart rate, and activity data

entities.name: V Genetic Profile
entities.context: Markdown document summarizing V's genetic profile at Personal/Health/V_GENETIC_PROFILE.md

entities.name: Genome YAML
entities.context: Structured genome profile in YAML format at Personal/Health/hardware/genome_profile.yaml

entities.name: Pharmacogenomics Report
entities.context: Static GeneSight report detailing V's pharmacogenomic markers

entities.name: Lab Results
entities.context: Blood draw lab results stored in Personal/Health/labs/, updated per draw

entities.name: Bio Snapshots
entities.context: Check-in bio snapshots stored in N5/data/journal.db bio_snapshots table

entities.name: Current Medications
entities.context: V's active medications tracked in YAML at Personal/Health/stack/current_medications.yaml

entities.name: Current Supplements
entities.context: V's active supplements tracked in YAML at Personal/Health/stack/current_supplements.yaml

entities.name: DuckDB
entities.context: Database engine used to store genomics data (v-s-23andme-genome/data.duckdb) and potentially other datasets

entities.name: N5 Journal DB
entities.context: SQLite database at N5/data/journal.db housing bio_snapshots and other journal data

entities.name: Health Data System
entities.context: V's integrated personal health knowledge system spanning genomics, labs, wearables, medications, and supplements

relationships.context: 23andMe genomics data feeds into V's genetic profile documentation
23andMe raw genome stored in DuckDB dataset (631k SNPs)
GeneSight produced V's pharmacogenomics report in Feb 2022
Fitbit syncs daily sleep/HR/activity data stored in workouts.db
Bio snapshots are stored as a table within N5's journal.db
Medications YAML is a component of V's integrated health data
Supplements YAML is a component of V's integrated health data
Lab results updated per blood draw feed into health tracking
Structured YAML genome profile complements the markdown genetic profile
